hypothesis: If pretrained on large-scale multimodal molecular data with a custom BPE tokenizer and a hybrid Transformer–Mamba-2 encoder-decoder architecture, then STR-Bamba will learn unified embeddings that yield better clustering (lower Davies–Bouldin Index, higher ARI/V-Measure/Fowlkes–Mallows), improved downstream property prediction across small molecules, polymers, and electrolytes, and higher-fidelity translation between molecular representations (validity, Tanimoto, BLEU, Jaccard) than single-modality or baseline models, because its multimodal pretraining and architectural design capture complementary syntactic and semantic information across representations.
